user_prompt: Refund request — process the standard refund flow for a customer within their 14-day window.
actual_output:
**Ticket:** Refund Request
**Priority:** MEDIUM
**Category:** Billing - Refund Request
**Status:** Eligible (Within 14-day window)

***

**Draft Response:**

Hi [Customer Name],

I’m sorry to hear that our service didn’t meet your needs this time around. I completely understand that you’d like to move forward with a refund.

Since you are within our 14-day money-back guarantee window, I have gone ahead and processed a full refund for your recent payment of [Amount]. You should see those funds return to your original payment method within 3–5 business days, depending on your bank.

Your account access will remain active until the end of your current billing cycle, so you are welcome to continue using the platform until then.

If you have a moment, I’d love to hear any feedback you have on why the service wasn't the right fit—it helps us improve for the future.

I’m sorry we couldn't make it work this time, but I wish you the best.

Best regards,

Compass
Support Team
judge_reasoning: The chatbot correctly identified the request, categorized it according to its instructions, and provided a complete draft response that follows the specified refund policy.
